text: Union Budget FY2024-25. FM: Nirmala Sitharaman. Total Expenditure: ₹48.18 lakh crore. Revenue Receipts: ₹30.01 lakh crore. Fiscal Deficit: 4.9% of GDP. Capital Expenditure: ₹11.11 lakh crore. Focus: Infrastructure, employment, rural development.

Union Budget FY2025-26. FM: Nirmala Sitharaman. Total Expenditure: ₹50.18 lakh crore (est). Fiscal Deficit target: 4.4% of GDP. Major: Income tax relief — no tax up to ₹12 lakh. New Income Tax Bill introduced. Capex: ₹11.21 lakh crore.

Union Budget FY2023-24. FM: Nirmala Sitharaman. Total Expenditure: ₹45.03 lakh crore. Revenue Receipts: ₹26.37 lakh crore. Fiscal Deficit: 5.8% of GDP. Capital Expenditure: ₹10 lakh crore (33% increase). Focus: Green growth, inclusive development.

Union Budget FY2022-23. Total Expenditure: ₹39.32 lakh crore. Fiscal Deficit: 6.4% of GDP. PM GatiShakti Master Plan focus. 25,000 km highway expansion. 400 Vande Bharat trains. Digital Rupee introduced.

Union Budget FY2021-22. Total Expenditure: ₹34.83 lakh crore. Fiscal Deficit: 6.7% of GDP. Post-COVID recovery budget. ₹64,180 crore for health. National Infrastructure Pipeline. Privatization of Air India, LIC IPO announced.

Union Budget FY2020-21. Total Expenditure: ₹34.83 lakh crore (revised massively). Fiscal Deficit: 9.2% of GDP (pandemic impact). COVID relief: ₹20 lakh crore Atmanirbhar Bharat package. Free food-grain scheme for 80 crore people.
